title: parathelypteris uraiensis
intro: Parathelypteris uraiensis, also known as Urai-ran or Urai-ran-ge, is a type of fern native to East Asia, particularly found in China and Japan. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antipyretic effects. The health benefits of Parathelypteris uraiensis include relief from fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, Parathelypteris uraiensis is often used in tea or decoction form, and it can also be dried and used as a powder or tincture.
